title: coprosma obconica subsp. distantia
intro: Coprosma obconica subsp. distantia, also known as the Mirror Bush, is a shrubby plant species native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its leaves have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coprosma obconica subsp. distantia include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Mirror Bush can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal and health benefits.
